title: Lake Simcoe Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative - Canada.ca
content:
## Lake Simcoe Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative
Protecting the waters of Lake Simcoe through a Freshwater Action Plan
- Canada invests over $1 million to protect and restore Lake Simcoe

## Services and information
Summary of key issues related to Lake Simcoe and contact information.

### Funding opportunities
Information on Lake Simcoe, the impact of nutrient pollution and Canada’s commitment to address these issues.
Projects funded under the Lake Simcoe Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
